description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and minimalistic design, surrounded by a low white picket fence and lush green lawn. The house features large, black-framed glass doors on two sides, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior walls are smooth and painted white, with a single small window on one side, emphasizing simplicity and function. The fenced yard is densely bordered with white flowering shrubs, creating a private and inviting outdoor space. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a black base, suggesting a raised foundation or platform. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and well-suited for an urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, white cubic house with large glass doors, a flat roof, and a fenced green yard bordered by white flowering shrubs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main glass double doors, white picket fence, and dense white flowering shrubs enclosing the yard.
description_view_1: Side view reveals a second set of glass doors and a more open lawn area, with the fence visible on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain white wall with a single small window and the green lawn extending to the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the fenced yard and the uninterrupted white wall of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass doors and a single small window
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features large black-framed glass double doors, flush with the facade, and accessed through a white picket gate with no steps or porch.
